education.thesis_title: Efficient Transformer Architectures for Low-Resource NLP
Federated Learning with Differential Privacy for Healthcare NLP

publications.title: Differentially Private Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models

intro_call_summary: Student is passionate about privacy-preserving AI, especially federated learning applied to sensitive healthcare text data. Wants a lab with both systems and NLP expertise. Open to interdisciplinary groups spanning CS and medical informatics.
resume_text: IIT Bombay graduate with research in federated learning and NLP. Published at ACL 2024. Strong PyTorch and distributed systems background.
